# OpenAPI drift allowlist — routes registered in router.go but not yet
# documented in openapi.yaml. Tracked in #32 (coverage expansion).
#
# As routes migrate into openapi.yaml, delete their lines from this file.
# The drift test (openapi_drift_test.go::TestOpenAPINoDrift) also fails
# if an allowlist entry no longer matches a registered route — keeps
# this list from rotting.
#
# Format: one "METHOD /path" per line. Blank lines and # comments are
# ignored. Entries are sorted; keep them sorted when adding new ones.

DELETE /api/alarms/channels/{id}
DELETE /api/alarms/definitions/{id}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/acme/accounts/{name}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/acme/plugins/{id}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/containers/{vmid}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/containers/{vmid}/snapshots/{snapname}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/drs/recommendations/{id}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/drs/rules/{id}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/ha/{type}/{vmid}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/nodes/{node}/certificates/custom
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/nodes/{node}/network/{iface}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/pools/{poolid}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/vms/{vmid}
DELETE /api/clusters/{cluster}/vms/{vmid}/snapshots/{snapname}
DELETE /api/datacenters/{id}
DELETE /api/folders/{id}
DELETE /api/folders/{id}/members
DELETE /api/inventory/clusters/{name}
DELETE /api/inventory/hosts/{id}
DELETE /api/library/{id}
DELETE /api/migrations/{upid}
DELETE /api/rbac/assignments/{id}
DELETE /api/rbac/roles/{id}
DELETE /api/scheduler/tasks/{id}
DELETE /api/tags/assign
DELETE /api/tags/{id}
